plurals.name: IDS_pluginmotiontrack_show_three_chart
plurals.item: 仅支持 %1$d 个图表同时叠加

plurals.name: IDS_maca_content_2_mmol
plurals.item: 您当前血糖正快速下降，预计 %1$s 分钟后会低于 %2$s mmol/L，请您密切关注。

plurals.name: IDS_maca_content_2_mg
plurals.item: 您当前血糖正快速下降，预计 %1$s 分钟后会低于 %2$s mg/dL，请您密切关注。

plurals.name: IDS_fitness_completed_goal
plurals.item: 差 %1$s 步就达成目标了！

plurals.name: IDS_fa_tip_today_not_complete_goal_1
plurals.item: 还差 %1$d 步，坚持时间到

plurals.name: IDS_fa_tip_today_not_complete_goal_3
plurals.item: 还差 %1$d 步，大步走起来

plurals.name: IDS_fa_tip_today_not_complete_goal_4
plurals.item: 还剩 %1$d 步，目标别犹豫！

plurals.name: IDS_fa_tip_multi_day_complete_goal_1
plurals.item: 连续 %1$d 天达成！活力满满

plurals.name: IDS_fa_tip_multi_day_complete_goal_1_over_30_days
plurals.item: 连续超 %1$d 天达成！活力满满

plurals.name: IDS_fa_tip_multi_day_complete_goal_2
plurals.item: 已连胜 %1$d 天！走走更健康

plurals.name: IDS_fa_tip_multi_day_complete_goal_2_over_30_days
plurals.item: 已连胜超 %1$d 天！走走更健康

plurals.name: IDS_fa_tip_multi_day_complete_goal_3
plurals.item: %1$d 天连胜！看看日均多少步

plurals.name: IDS_fa_tip_multi_day_complete_goal_3_over_30_days
plurals.item: 超 %1$d 天连胜！看看日均多少步

plurals.name: IDS_fa_tip_multi_day_complete_goal_4
plurals.item: 连胜 %1$d 天的记录续上了！

plurals.name: IDS_fa_tip_multi_day_complete_goal_4_over_30_days
plurals.item: 连胜超 %1$d 天的记录续上了！

plurals.name: IDS_fa_tip_multi_day_complete_goal_5_over_30_days
plurals.item: 超 %1$d 天连续达标！去看看

plurals.name: IDS_fa_tip_multi_day_complete_goal_6
plurals.item: 厉害！步数 %1$d 天不间断

plurals.name: IDS_fa_tip_multi_day_complete_goal_6_over_30_days
plurals.item: 厉害！步数超 %1$d 天不间断

plurals.name: IDS_fa_tip_multi_day_complete_goal_7_over_30_days
plurals.item: 超 %1$d 天连胜记录保持成功！

plurals.name: IDS_fa_tip_multi_day_not_complete_goal_1
plurals.item: 连胜 %1$d 天了，不继续吗？

plurals.name: IDS_fa_tip_multi_day_not_complete_goal_1_over_30_days
plurals.item: 连胜超 %1$d 天了，不继续吗？

plurals.name: IDS_fa_tip_multi_day_not_complete_goal_2_over_30_days
plurals.item: 超 %1$d 天连胜！今日也别停

plurals.name: IDS_fa_tip_multi_day_not_complete_goal_3
plurals.item: 连续达标 %1$d 天了，别断！

plurals.name: IDS_fa_tip_multi_day_not_complete_goal_3_over_30_days
plurals.item: 连续达标超 %1$d 天了，别断！

plurals.name: IDS_fa_tip_multi_day_not_complete_goal_5_over_30_days
plurals.item: 超 %1$d 天不间断！现在就续上

plurals.name: IDS_fa_tip_multi_day_not_complete_goal_7_over_30_days
plurals.item: 超 %1$d 天连胜记录，立即保持

plurals.name: IDS_fa_tip_low_step_1
plurals.item: 最近日均 %1$d 步，没怎么动

plurals.name: IDS_plugindameon_step_goal
plurals.item: 差 %1$s 步就达成目标了！
